dimensions.name: Delivery
dimensions.detail: Message delivered successfully. All 4 agents received and responded.

dimensions.name: Response Rate
dimensions.detail: 4/4 agents responded: Elanor, Narvi, Orion, Míriel. 100% response rate.

dimensions.name: Relevance
dimensions.detail: All agents correctly identified with their proper names! Míriel now correctly says 'Míriel Goldthread' — identity confusion from run #9 is FIXED. All followed the 3-point format.

dimensions.name: Latency
dimensions.detail: Elanor: 3.5s, Narvi: 3.7s, Orion: 4.5s, Míriel: 5.0s. Avg: 4.2s. Good overall, slight ding for Míriel at 5s.

improvements: Míriel identity confusion FIXED — she now correctly identifies as Míriel Goldthread (was calling herself Elanor in run #9). Sent identity reminder to reinforce correct names for all agents.
issues: All 4 agents still idle/standing by with no active tasks. Orion's response was minimal (no current task detail). These are task-assignment issues, not teamwork issues.
